content: Foundation.Process (NSTask) on macOS places the spawned child process in its own process group (PGID = child PID), different from the parent's group. All children spawned by the child in non-interactive shell mode inherit the same PGID. Use kill(-process.processIdentifier, SIGTERM) then kill(-process.processIdentifier, SIGKILL) after grace to kill the whole tree. killpg(pgid, sig) is equivalent to kill(-pgid, sig). On macOS, setpgid(0,0) makes the calling process a process group leader; Foundation.Process does this for you automatically.
